title: VSCode
description: This collection features carefully selected VSCode extensions and workflow optimizations, covering formatting, Markdown, icon and JSON sorting, and more.
content:
## VSCode

VSCode needs little introduction; I've used it for many years in daily development. Here are a few recommended VSCode plugins for those interested to download and try.

## Beautify

Beautify code in place for VS Code

Code color display effect

[Beautify](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=HookyQR.beautify) javascript, JSON, CSS, Sass, and HTML in Visual Studio Code.

## Code Spell Checker

Spelling checker for source code

When writing code, if you accidentally misspell a word, this will automatically display a warning to help correct the error.

[Code Spell Checker](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=streetsidesoftware.code-spell-checker)

A basic spell checker that works well with camelCase code.

The goal of this spell checker is to help... Catch common spelling errors while keeping the number of false positives low.

## English Word Hint

English Word Autocompletion for Visual Studio Code

When coding, if you accidentally misspell a word, this will automatically provide a warning to help correct the error.

[English Word Hint](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=wushuaiBUAA.autocomplete-english-word)

## Markdown Lint

Markdown Linting and Style Checking for Visual Studio Code

A very simple Markdown tool, preview the effect on the right.

[markdownlint](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=DavidAnson.vscode-markdownlint)

## Material Icon Theme

Material Design Icons for Visual Studio Code

File icons, aesthetic enhancement effects.

[Material Icon Theme](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=PKief.material-icon-theme)

## Prettier

Prettier Formatter for Visual Studio Code

Code Formatting

[Prettier](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=esbenp.prettier-vscode)

## Shell Formatting

Shellscript, Dockerfile, properties, gitignore, dotenv, hosts, jvmoptions... Document Formatting

[Shell Formatting](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=foxundermoon.shell-format)

## Sort JSON Objects

Sorts the keys within JSON objects

For comparing files and network data, sort can quickly sort the order of different files, making diffing very intuitive.

[Sort JSON Objects](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=richie5um2.vscode-sort-json)
